mainpage.annoucement: 7.3k scripts in December! Try out GuardX, a dashboard that displays real-time data of scripts on guard.lol! Windows only. Find/upload/create/list/save scripts all in free GuardX!

features.title: The Community
features.message: We let anyone be part of the GS LTD, as we care about everyone's voice.

features.title: Update Delivery
features.message: We will keep our customers up to date with every update, to ensure your best experience!

features.title: Developers
features.message: Be rest assured that the programmers (1) in this ltd will provide the best of the best and not anything malicious.

features.title: Support Team
features.message: Our support team will make sure your problem will be solved and not unread.

features.title: Compatibility
features.message: guard's scripts are compatible with almost every executor (depends on the script)-- including the free executors!

features.title: Original Content
features.message: Only Original content are supplied to this service, allowing for a new surprise every time! You will never see reposts.
